description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 11, 2025 at 10:31 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car in a parking garage at Mission Street and Angelo’s Alley.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling in a parking garage off of Mission Street and approached a passenger car that was stopped, facing the wrong 
direction in the opposing lane of travel. The Waymo AV began to proceed straight, passing the passenger car, when the passenger car began 
to reverse, maneuvering into the Waymo AV’s lane of travel, and the front passenger side of the passenger car made contact with the driver 
side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The passenger car 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
